github.description: GitHub API access (create issues, PRs, read repos). Enable when you need programmatic GitHub access. Requires GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.

filesystem.description: Extended filesystem operations beyond built-in tools. Enable if you need advanced file operations. Usually not needed - built-in tools are sufficient.

sqlite.description: SQLite database access. Enable if you add a SQLite database to the project.

notes: All MCP servers are DISABLED by default to avoid overhead.
Enable only what you need for specific tasks.
GitHub server requires GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable.
Environment variables: Use ${VAR_NAME} syntax, set in .claude/settings.json or system env.
Personal MCP servers go in ~/.claude.json (user scope), not here.
